title: 私とあなたの、小さな雪景色

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back to the academy with Silence
Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It feels like she's been looking over my way a lot...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer. Can you stop by the trainer's office?
choice_data_list: Yeah, we can stop on the way.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... Um... I meant, like... just you, by yourself...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'll... catch up with you afterwards. If you don't
mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the trainer's office and wait for her, just
as she asked.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Just a second. Don't turn around yet.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Okay, you can look.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I turn around to find...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A snow globe identical to the one Silence Suzuka
got from the arcade the other day sits on my
desk.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I managed to get this one all by myself.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's the same snowy landscape that I love so much.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And when you hit this switch, it lights up and the
snow swirls around. It's really pretty...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It looks just like the place where I grew up.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: So... Um...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What do you think?
choice_data_list:
The snow in your hometown must also be very
pretty then.

The snow in your hometown must also be very
pretty then.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What do you think?
choice_data_list:
The snow in your hometown must also be very
pretty then.

The snow in your hometown must also be very
pretty then.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm so relieved...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's like... an actual weight has been lifted off my
shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You know...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I could break into a run right this instant.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a long look at the matching snow globe
Silence Suzuka brought me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll be sure to display the small piece of winter
scenery in a prominent position in my room.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes! That's right.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's so peaceful with the snow piled up
everywhere. It feels like you've been sucked into
a new world.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Running there feels amazing... like you could go
anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And just keep running forever... You begin to wish
the scenery would never end.
choice_data_list: I'd like to see it one day.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Definitely. I'm sure the scenery would look even
more beautiful with you by my side.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka describes her hometown while
gazing down at the miniature winter landscape.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The snow globe lights up as powdered flakes
dance around the two snowmen inside.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Isn't it pretty?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One of the little snowmen tips over suddenly and
ends up leaning against the other.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It fell over.
choice_data_list: I'm sorry. And you worked so hard to get it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, why don't we trade snow globes?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm sure.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I like this one. The little snowman isn't
lonely with his friend so close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Silence Suzuka and I trade snow
globes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems very content as she returns home with
the globe, the snowmen nestled close together.
